events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1043. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: gluten. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes tofu. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/700 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/700 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–70) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/700 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 40–70) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1043 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00 (Sunset group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1043: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
